title: callicarpa erioclona var. subalbida
intro: Callicarpa erioclona var. subalbida is a plant species known as the White Purple Passionflower, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of Callicarpa erioclona var. subalbida are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
